tabs.label: Currency
tabs.description: Core currency and its Greater and Perfect variants.

tabs.label: Quality
tabs.description: Equipment, flask, gem, jewellery, and alternate-quality currency.

tabs.label: Socketing / Augments
tabs.description: Socket currency, Runes, Soul Cores, Idols, and other socketable augments.

tabs.label: Ritual / Omens
tabs.description: Omens that modify a later qualifying crafting operation.

tabs.label: Essences
tabs.description: Standard, Greater, Perfect, and mechanic-specific Essences.

tabs.label: Abyss
tabs.description: Desecration, Abyssal Bones, and Abyss-specific crafting items.

tabs.label: Breach / Genesis
tabs.description: Breach Catalysts, Genesis crafting, and Breach-specific items.

tabs.label: Runeforging
tabs.description: Expedition Alloys, Resistance Fluxes, and Runeforging resources.

tabs.label: Corruption / Sacrifice
tabs.description: Vaal, Temple, Atziri, corruption, and sacrifice operations.

definitions.description: Upgrades a Normal item to Magic and adds a modifier.
Upgrades a Normal item to Magic and adds a modifier with Minimum Modifier Level 44.
Upgrades a Normal item to Magic and adds a modifier with Minimum Modifier Level 70.
Adds a modifier to a Magic item.
Adds a modifier to a Magic item with Minimum Modifier Level 44.
Adds a modifier to a Magic item with Minimum Modifier Level 70.
Upgrades a Normal or Magic item to Rare and rolls four fresh modifiers.
Upgrades a Magic item to Rare and adds a modifier.
Upgrades a Magic item to Rare and adds a modifier with Minimum Modifier Level 35.
Upgrades a Magic item to Rare and adds a modifier with Minimum Modifier Level 50.
Adds a modifier to a Rare item with an open affix slot.
Adds a modifier to a Rare item with Minimum Modifier Level 35.
Adds a modifier to a Rare item with Minimum Modifier Level 50.
Removes one removable modifier from a Rare item and adds an eligible replacement.
Modifies a Rare item and applies Minimum Modifier Level 35 to the replacement.
Modifies a Rare item and applies Minimum Modifier Level 50 to the replacement.
Removes a random removable explicit modifier.
Rerolls eligible numeric values on non-fractured modifiers.
Fractures a random revealed modifier on a Rare item with at least four modifiers.
Applies a Lock that previews the next supported item mutation before it is committed.
definitions.blocker: Normalized source item identity is unavailable; existing runtime behavior is preserved without fabricating a source ID or metadata key.

definitions.description: Adds only a Prefix during the next qualifying Desecration.
Adds only a Suffix during the next qualifying Desecration.
Allows the next qualifying Well of Souls reveal to reroll its options once.
Makes the next qualifying Orb of Annulment remove only a revealed Desecrated modifier.
The target-version Sovereign Lich-type modifier guarantee is retained but not implemented.
definitions.disabledReason: Mechanic blocked because the exact target-version Omen of the Sovereign Lich-type modifier guarantee and applicable modifier table are not verified.
definitions.blocker: Mechanic blocked because the exact target-version Omen of the Sovereign Lich-type modifier guarantee and applicable modifier table are not verified.

definitions.description: The target-version Liege Lich-type modifier guarantee is retained but not implemented.
definitions.disabledReason: Mechanic blocked because the exact target-version Omen of the Liege Lich-type modifier guarantee and applicable modifier table are not verified.
definitions.blocker: Mechanic blocked because the exact target-version Omen of the Liege Lich-type modifier guarantee and applicable modifier table are not verified.

definitions.description: The target-version Blackblooded Lich-type modifier guarantee is retained but not implemented.
definitions.disabledReason: Mechanic blocked because the exact target-version Omen of the Blackblooded Lich-type modifier guarantee and applicable modifier table are not verified.
definitions.blocker: Mechanic blocked because the exact target-version Omen of the Blackblooded Lich-type modifier guarantee and applicable modifier table are not verified.

definitions.description: Makes the next qualifying Chaos Orb remove a modifier with the lowest modifier level.
Makes the next qualifying Chaos Orb remove a Prefix.
Makes the next qualifying Chaos Orb remove a Suffix.
Makes the next qualifying Orb of Annulment remove a Prefix.
Makes the next qualifying Orb of Annulment remove a Suffix.
Makes the next qualifying Divine Orb sanctify the item and lock further modification.
Starts a qualifying Desecration and opens the Well of Souls reveal flow.
Removes a removable modifier from a Rare item and adds the Mark of the Abyssal Lord.
The retained Breach Essence identity is visible, but its target-version equipment mutation is not enabled.
definitions.disabledReason: Mechanic blocked because the exact target-version Essence of the Breach Caster/Minion modifier mapping, applicable item classes, and replacement behavior are not verified.
definitions.blocker: Mechanic blocked because the exact target-version Essence of the Breach Caster/Minion modifier mapping, applicable item classes, and replacement behavior are not verified.

definitions.description: Corrupts the item and applies one eligible implemented corruption outcome.
definitions.blocker: Exact target-version Vaal Orb outcome probabilities are not encoded by the retained public data.
